name: ghtun-warzone
postAttachCommand: bash -c 'echo "[G-Tunnel] Waiting for environment to be ready..."; until gh codespace ports visibility 443:public -c $CODESPACE_NAME >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 5; done; if ! pgrep -x xray >/dev/null; then sudo /usr/local/bin/xray -c /etc/config.json &>/tmp/xray.log & sleep 2; fi; /usr/local/bin/print-configs.sh'
